description: Akash from Stripe discusses the company's crypto team and its focus on building tools for Web3 developers. He highlights the challenges non-crypto native consumers face when onboarding to Web3 platforms and introduces Stripe's fiat to crypto on-ramp solution, demonstrated using Audius as a partner. The on-ramp simplifies the process for users to acquire crypto assets without needing extensive knowledge of the underlying technology.
topic_summary: Stripe's crypto team aims to facilitate easier onboarding for non-crypto native consumers to Web3 platforms through a fiat to crypto on-ramp solution, as demonstrated with Audius [t=119.24].
